aquilon_ruins.name: Aquilon Ruins (Enclave)
aquilon_ruins.description: The skeleton of an ancient city where survivors hide from the creatures of Silence under a weak dome.

ash_desert.name: Ash Desert (Plains)
ash_desert.description: Dead lands covered in a thick layer of gray volcanic ash.

silent_forest.name: Silent Forest (Forest)
silent_forest.description: Petrified trees where shadows of the past roam.

scrap_canyon.name: Scrap Canyon (Mountains)
scrap_canyon.description: A giant junkyard of Architect machines where stalkers scavenge for resources.

dead_lake.name: Dead Lake (Swamp)
dead_lake.description: A body of water filled with toxic waste from ancient wars.

iron_remnant_base.name: Iron Remnant Base (Citadel)
iron_remnant_base.description: A fortified bunker of techno-fascists controlling the remaining technology.

rusting_spires.name: Rusting Spires (Ruins)
rusting_spires.description: Fallen floating islands whose metal structures are slowly decaying.

deep_vault_7.name: Deep Vault 7 (Settlement)
deep_vault_7.description: A sealed dwarven bunker that hasn't sent a signal in decades.

whispering_dunes.name: Whispering Dunes (Desert)
whispering_dunes.description: Sands that echo the voices of those who died here of thirst.

sunken_haven.name: Sunken Haven (Ruins)
sunken_haven.description: Remnants of a port city half-submerged in poisoned water.

bone_fields.name: Bone Fields (Plains)
bone_fields.description: A mass grave of giant mutants whose bones are used for building.

forgotten_obs.name: Forgotten Observatory (Ruins)
forgotten_obs.description: A frozen peak that has become a refuge for Void cultists.

flesh_craft_pits.name: Flesh-Craft Pits (Settlement)
flesh_craft_pits.description: A camp of madmen trying to 'improve' themselves with mutagens.

crystal_wastes.name: Crystal Wastes (Plains)
crystal_wastes.description: A plain littered with shards of exploded mana crystals.

muted_valley.name: Muted Valley (Anomaly)
muted_valley.description: A zone of absolute silence where sound physically cannot travel.
